allow: Bash(source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 18 && node --version && pnpm install 2>&1)
Bash(source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 18 && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@latest --activate 2>&1)
Bash(source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10 --activate 2>&1)
Bash(echo "20" > /Users/mind/Projects/basiliscvs/.nvmrc && source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 && pnpm install 2>&1)
Bash(source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 && pnpm add -g gatsby-cli 2>&1)
Bash(source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 && pnpm setup && source ~/.zshrc && pnpm add -g gatsby-cli 2>&1)
Bash(source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 && PNPM_HOME="/Users/mind/Library/pnpm" PATH="$PNPM_HOME/bin:$PATH" pnpm add -g gatsby-cli 2>&1)
Bash(rm -f pnpm-lock.yaml && source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 && pnpm install 2>&1)

Bash(git add \\
  .nvmrc \\
  pnpm-lock.yaml \\
  pnpm-workspace.yaml \\
  gatsby-config.js \\
  package.json \\
  yarn.lock \\
  .vscode/settings.json \\
  src/components/navbar/Navbar.js \\
  src/components/navbar/navbar.css \\
  src/components/section.contact/Section.Contact.js \\
  src/components/section.gallery/ \\
  src/components/section.about/ \\
  src/components/sectionService/section.service.js \\
  src/components/seo.js \\
  src/pages/404.js \\
  src/pages/index.js)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
refactor: Gatsby 5 migration, pnpm, new sections and navbar rebuild

- Migrate Gatsby 4 → 5, React 17 → 18, drop react-helmet for Head API
- Switch yarn → pnpm, pin Node 20 via .nvmrc
- Remove unused deps: react-helmet, styled-components, gatsby-plugin-gatsby-cloud, FontAwesome npm packages
- Add SectionAbout with bio, instruments and style tags
- Add SectionGallery: masonry grid \(desktop\), snap carousel \(mobile\), lightbox with keyboard nav
- Rebuild Navbar: full-screen mobile overlay with nav links + social icons, transparent→solid on scroll, fix event listener memory leak
- Improve SectionServices copy to match band voice and target markets
- Fix email typo in SectionContact \(basilisvs → basiliscvs\)
- Remove debug console.log from gatsby-config.js

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add \\
  src/components/section.members/ \\
  src/components/navbar/Navbar.js \\
  src/pages/index.js \\
  src/images/CHRISV6.png 2>&1 && git status --short)
Bash(git add src/images/DUENDE.svg src/images/Exquisito.svg 2>&1 && git status --short)
